category_sources: Official LightGBM docs describe it as a gradient boosting framework using tree based learning algorithms.
source_facts.description says it is a fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official LightGBM GitHub project.
docs_sources: Official LightGBM documentation is hosted on lightgbm.readthedocs.io and linked as the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/lightgbm-org/LightGBM; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies gradient boosting and distributed performance.
